title: Hydra MCP connector config
description: state/connectors/mcp.json — Hydra's inbound MCP server surface (authorized_agents) + outbound upstream_supervisor channel + audit log config. See docs/specs/2026-04-16-mcp-agent-interface.md + docs/specs/2026-04-17-mcp-register-agent.md + docs/specs/2026-04-17-connector-wizard.md.

bind_address.description: IP to bind the HTTP server to. Keep on loopback (127.0.0.1) unless you have a reverse proxy with TLS in front.

authorized_agents.description: Each entry authorizes one external agent to call Hydra MCP tools. Populated by ./hydra mcp register-agent — raw tokens never live here, only SHA-256 hashes.

upstream_supervisor.description: Outbound channel — when Commander can't resolve a worker's QUESTION: from memory, it calls this supervisor's resolve_question MCP tool. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-supervisor-escalate-client.md.

connect_url.description: stdio command OR https URL. Required when enabled=true.

auth_token_env.description: Env var holding the bearer token presented to the supervisor. Token itself is never persisted here.

scope_granted.description: Hydra invariant: exactly ["resolve_question"]. Widening without spec review is forbidden.

path_override.description: Override audit log path. Null = logs/mcp-audit.jsonl.
